description: A project planner is analyzing schedule performance by comparing the actual progress against the original baseline.

nodes.task_description: Apply a view that shows the current schedule bars alongside the baseline bars.

expected_outcome.value: The planner can now visually compare the actual progress to the original plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the activities that have the largest negative variance (i.e., are the most delayed) and flag them for investigation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the top 3 delayed activities to be discussed in the next project meeting.
